messages.content: 我真的很抱歉这次会议无法改到下午，明白明天早上的时间对你来说太早了，因为明天早上的会议是英文版本的，因此我们需要美国团队参加并回答一些有可能出现的问题，我们会在会后将recording of the English version of the training 上传到LMS，然后你在观看之后如果有任何疑问的话，可以随时联系我们，我们总是在这里帮助您。帮我发封英语邮件给供应商说明此情况

Subject: Apologies for the morning meeting, recording to be uploaded later

Dear [Supplier Name],

I want to express my sincerest apologies for the morning meeting tomorrow that we are unable to reschedule to the afternoon. I understand that the early morning timing may not be suitable for you. However, it is an English version meeting and we require participation from our team in the United States to answer the anticipated questions.

After the meeting, we will be uploading the recording of the English version of the training to our LMS. In case you have any questions or clarifications, please feel free to contact us at any time. We are always here to help you.

Once again, I apologize for the inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding. Thank you.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
第一段重新写一些

I deeply apologize that we are unable to reschedule the meeting to the afternoon. I understand that the early morning schedule may not be convenient for you. However, the meeting is an English version, and we need the participation of our team in the United States to ensure that we can answer all of the potential questions.
重新写一下

I'm extremely sorry that we cannot schedule the meeting for the afternoon. I understand that the morning timing may not be convenient for you. However, the meeting is in English, and we require our team in the United States to participate to ensure we can address any potential questions.
我真的很抱歉这次会议无法改到下午，明白明天早上的时间对你来说太早了，因为明天早上的会议是英文版本的，因此我们需要美国团队参加并回答一些不可预见的问题，我们会在会后将recording of the English version of the training 上传到LMS，然后你在观看之后如果有任何疑问的话，可以随时联系我们，我们总是在这里帮助您。帮我发封英语邮件给供应商说明此情况

Subject: Apologies for the morning meeting, Recording to be uploaded later

Dear [Supplier Name],

I would like to express my sincere apologies that we are unable to reschedule the meeting to the afternoon. I understand that the early morning timing may not be suitable for you. However, since the meeting is in English, our team from the United States must participate to address any potential unforeseen issues.

After the meeting, we will be uploading the recording of the English version of the training to our Learning Management System for your reference. If you have any questions or need further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are always available here to help and support you.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused and thank you for your understanding.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Name]
重新写一封

Subject: Apologies for the Early Morning Meeting, Recording to be Shared Later

Dear [Supplier Name],

I am writing to apologize for the inconvenience caused by scheduling the upcoming meeting for tomorrow morning. I understand that the early timing may be challenging for you. Unfortunately, as the meeting will be in English, we anticipate needing support and participation from our team in the United States to address any unforeseen questions that may arise.

I wanted to assure you that we have plans to record the English version of the training, and it will be uploaded to our Learning Management System (LMS) after the meeting for your reference. We encourage you to take advantage of this resource and get in touch with any questions or concerns you may have after viewing the recording. I want to stress that we are here to support and assist you in any way we can.

I again apologize for any inconvenience the scheduling may have caused you. Please do not hesitate to reach out to us if you have any questions or concerns regarding this matter.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Subject: Apologies for the Early Morning Meeting, Recording to be Shared Later

Dear [Supplier Name],

I am writing to express my deepest apologies for the inconvenience caused by scheduling the upcoming meeting for tomorrow morning. I can understand the early timing may present a challenge for you.

Unfortunately, as the meeting will be entirely in English, we anticipate needing support and participation from our team in the United States to address any unforeseen questions or concerns that may arise.

However, to ensure you do not miss any vital information, we will be recording the English version of the training and uploading it to our Learning Management System (LMS) following the meeting. Please take advantage of this resource, and feel free to reach out to us with any questions or concerns you may have after viewing the recording. We are always available to support you and answer any questions you may have.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience that you may have encountered due to the scheduling. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to get in touch with us at any time.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

谢谢你的回复zisan，我们明白明天的会议时间对你来说有点早，并且你们的办公室在早上10点才开门，但是很抱歉我们将培训时间更改到其他时间。但是为了使您更加清楚的明白centric brands 的合规系统，我们在会议之后将recording of the English version of the training 上传到LMS，然后你在观看之后如果有任何疑问的话，可以随时联系我们，我们总是在这里帮助您。帮我发封英语邮件给供应商说明此情况

Subject: Apologies for Early Morning Training, Recording Available Later

Dear [Supplier Name],

I would like to apologize for scheduling the upcoming training session tomorrow morning at a time that is not convenient for you. I understand your office does not open until 10 AM, and I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. Unfortunately, due to scheduling constraints, we are unable to reschedule the training at this time.

However, we would like to ensure that you have access to all the information related to Centric Brands' compliance system. Following the training session, we will be uploading the recording of the English version of the training to our Learning Management System (LMS). Please take advantage of this resource and reach out to us with any questions at any time. We are always available to assist you.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused by this scheduling conflict. If you have any concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Thank you for your understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
第一段重新写一下

I am writing to apologize for scheduling the upcoming training session at a time that is inconvenient for you. I understand that your office does not open until 10 AM, and I am sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused. Unfortunately, due to scheduling constraints, we are unable to reschedule the training at this time.

不会写了 
Thanks for your reply. First, I am sorry that we are cannot reschedule the upcoming training session in 12:30 or other time. We are understand your office does not open until 10:00 am, but since it is an English version training and we require participation from US team to answer any unforeseen questions that may arise. So
帮我优化一下

Thank you for your reply. I want to express my sincere apologies that we are unable to reschedule the upcoming training session to a time that is more suitable for you, such as 12:30 or any other time. I understand that your office opens at 10 am, and I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause you. Unfortunately, the training is in English, and we require the participation of our US team to address any potential unforeseen questions that may arise, which makes schedule adjustments challenging.

However, we don't want you to miss out on the valuable training content. Therefore, we will be uploading the recording of the English version of the training to our Learning Management System (LMS) after the session's completion. We encourage you to make use of this resource and contact us if you have any questions or concerns following the training. We are always available to assist you and clarify any doubts you may have.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused by this scheduling conflict. If you have any other concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to contact us for assistance.

Thank you for your understanding.
address能换一个词吗
Certainly! Instead of "address", you could use "resolve", "handle", or "answer".

I am sorry that we are unable to reschedule the training to the afternoon this time. I understand that the early morning timing is not suitable for you. However, it is an English version training and we require participation from US team to answer any unforeseen questions that may arise, which makes schedule adjustments challenging. 
帮我继续写，问他能不能接受在培训之后去LMS上观看记录

Thank you for your understanding regarding the scheduling of the training session. As mentioned earlier, we require our US team's participation in the English version training, and we cannot change the schedule this time.

I wanted to offer you another option to ensure that you do not miss any valuable training content. We will be uploading the recording of the English version training on our Learning Management System (LMS) immediately following the training session. Would it be possible for you to watch the recording at your convenience, once your office is open? This way, you will be fully updated on the training's content, and we can still address any questions or concerns you may have after you have watched the recording.

Please let me know if this is acceptable to you, and if you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are always available to assist you and provide any additional support you may need.

Thank you again for your understanding, and we look forward to hearing back from you.

Best regards, 

[Your Name]
不对 重新写

Apologies for any inconvenience caused by the scheduled timing of the training session tomorrow. We understand that the early morning timing may not be suitable for you. However, given the nature of the training - it being an English version - it is imperative that we have the participation of our US team to address any unforeseen questions that may arise.

We would like to offer you the opportunity to access the training content by providing you with the recording of the English version training, which will be uploaded to our Learning Management System (LMS) after the training session. You would be able to access the recording at your convenience, once your office is open and we encourage you to do so. We will be available to answer any questions or concerns you may have following the viewing of the recording.

Please let us know if this alternative solution works for you so we can ensure that you receive all of the information you need. If there are any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to get in touch with us.

Thank you for your attention.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
